channel.title: southernadventures1
channel.description: God First✝️ Custom Treehouse Builder southadvsbiz@gmail.com

item.title: Context: The reason the hoist snapped and dropped the lumber is ...
item.description:
Context: The reason the hoist snapped and dropped the lumber is because Caleb held the button too long and pulled the winch passed its limit, he couldn’t see well from his angle. Once the hook hit the pulley the direction of the force changed 90 degrees from download to inward, and it only took a split second before the winch torqued the eyebolt off and dropped the load. I was already filming and turned the camera around when the boards were about halfway down. Thankfully nobody was hurt and nothing was damaged aside form the little platform. The weld obviously sucked, I gotta do better on that next time. But I think I will just drill a hole and run a threaded bolt all the way through.
#treehouse #build #fyp #foryoupage
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
